topics.label: Tensors
topics.description: torch.tensor, dtype, device (CPU/GPU), operations. PyTorch tensors are like NumPy on GPU.

topics.label: Autograd
topics.description: Automatic differentiation with requires_grad and backward(). Foundation of training.

topics.label: nn.Module
topics.description: Define models by subclassing nn.Module. forward() defines the computation.

topics.label: DataLoader & Datasets
topics.description: torch.utils.data for batching, shuffling, and parallel loading.

topics.label: Training Loop
topics.description: Forward pass, loss, backward, optimizer.step(). The standard training pattern.

topics.label: GPU Training
topics.description: .to(device), CUDA tensors, and DataParallel for multi-GPU.

topics.label: Saving & Loading
topics.description: torch.save, torch.load, state_dict for model checkpoints.
